programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Crime Files

programme.title: Faraar Kab Tak
programme.desc: The Horrifying Fact That Millions Of Unidentified Criminals Are Absconding Across The Nation, Is Enough To Frighten Anyone! The Show Is A Clutter Breaking Factual Crime Drama Series That Appeals To The Inherent Security Concern Of A Family. Engaging Police Procedure On True Crime Cases Is Brought To Life With An Edge Of Seat Narrative.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Christmas Special 4_Twas the Night Before Liftoff
programme.desc: Unknown to the world, Thomas Edison built a secret lab where he invented a virtual version of himself and a robot named Von Bolt. With Edison as their guide, Angie and friends JD, Kent and Nicky set out to explore the fascinating world of science

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: SkippingRope
programme.desc: The Cubbies discover a skipping rope and decide to play with it. However, none of them knows how to use it correctly. Seeking help from Cuddle Power, they embark on a magical journey to learn the proper way to skip the rope and end up enjoying the playful activity.

programme.title: The Experiment
programme.desc: Billy and Jackson get into a tricky situation when Nigel Danforth hatches a plan to get his evil superpowers back.

programme.title: Ape Escape
programme.desc: Unknown to the world, Thomas Edison built a secret lab where he invented a virtual version of himself and a robot named Von Bolt. With Edison as their guide, Angie and friends JD, Kent and Nicky set out to explore the fascinating world of science

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Table Manners
programme.desc: The Cuddle Cubbies plan a picnic but face chaos due to confusion about table items. With the help of the cuddle power, they learn proper table manners, including using napkins and mats, sitting straight, and polite communication. The cubs transform the messy situation into a well-organized meal time.

programme.title: Krate Kid
programme.desc: Jerry's uncontrollable sneezing leads to a playful chase around the room. Jane tries to administer cough syrup to him but fails until she cleverly puts on a doctor's attire and successfully treats him. However, their roles reverse when Jerry attempts to administer cough syrup to Jane, resulting in a comical chase and Jane's injury. programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: I' ll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn' t chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it' s all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren' t really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Pincode

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates,warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: Gusto TV's Wizard of Whatever, Chef Kyle Crawford, is dishing up a holiday feast! There'll be food, fun, elves… and even jolly old St. Nick himself may make an appearance! Join in as Kyle cooks up a Christmas goose complete with stuffing and gravy, plus all the sides and salads, and even a flashy flambé dessert! Merry whatever! (S1 E01)

programme.title: Michael Bonacini's Christmas at the Farm
programme.desc: In this heartwarming holiday special, Chef Michael Bonacini invites us to his cozy farmhouse in Ontario for a charming Christmas feast. In this scenic winter retreat, Bonacini interprets classic Welsh and Italian Christmas dishes from his childhood. Michael cooks up comforting dishes from hearty potato leek soup, to succulent roast lamb, to classic molten chocolate lava cake. As he explores homey Christmas flavours, Michael shares his traditions and gives tips for perfecting the holiday meal. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Watts Up for the Holidays
programme.desc: Spencer Watts serves up his take on traditional holiday fare, showing us that you can make an impressive dinner without the stress. In this cheerful one-hour special, charming bachelor Spencer takes you through all the planning tips and lets you in on his secrets to create the ultimate holiday meal. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration. (S1 E1004)

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.desc: Chef Kimberly Lallouz is celebrating Winter Solstice with a Holiday Eatz menu of quick recipes guaranteed to get you out of the kitchen before the year's earliest sunset. First, she makes a Warm Green Bean Salad with crispy pancetta. Next, it's White Chili made with turkey, cannellini beans, and Poblano peppers. Stick around for her Double thick pork chop with Wild Mushrooms, Chestnuts, and Sage. For dessert? A pear flambe with sweet port, spices, and easy walnut streusel.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Highway On My Plate
programme.desc: Meet Rocky and Mayur - the highway stars with an attitude! Their tastes change with every kilometer as they hitch-hike their way across the country.

programme.title: Chakh Le India
programme.desc: Chakh Le India! is a series aimed at discovering different cities in India through their regional cuisines. The viewer embarks on a journey with anchor Aditya Bal as he travels through India sampling the local flavours of each city.

programme.title: Stamboli's Countryhouse, Crimea
programme.desc: Stamboli Villa is the most beautiful building in the city of Feodosia, located in the Crimean peninsula. It was built from 1909 to 1914. According to the legend, its creator was the leader of the Vienna secession, Otto Wagner. The cottage in Moorish style"&" was built on the order of tobacco manufacturer Josef Stamboli.

programme.title: Fengguo Monastery, China
programme.desc: A royal temple, witness of the Liao Dynasty in China: the Fengguo temple. It is a Buddhist temple possessing profound historical, artistic, scientific and social values. It contains the only extant and tallest wooden structured Buddha pagoda in China.

programme.title: Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris. These ancient city walls are some of the best-preserved in the country.

programme.title: In Alberobello Trulli, Italy
programme.desc: Alberobello is a village in Puglia where ancient traditions still characterize an entire community to this day. Perhaps the masterpiece of Puglia is Alberobello itself. No tourist manual ignores it. Every geography book for middle schools carries a photograph of its Trulli. Alberobello is a perfect village whose formula has become a style in the rigor with which it has been applied.

programme.title: Orhei Vechi Monastery, Moldova
programme.desc: Old Orhei is a Moldovan historical and archaeological complex located in Trebujeni, which is approximately 60 kilometres (37 mi) north-east of Chişinău on the Răut River in the Republic of Moldova. The ancient city of Orheiul Vechi is a natural and historical complex, located in a narrow bend of the Raut River. The natural landscape of limestone rock, eroded by the river, is combined with archaeological vestiges of the ancient Trypillian civilization. The Orthodox monastery is still inhabited by a handful of Orthodox monks, who maintain the church at the top of the hill. The caves are still functional as chapels. The caves contain an array of historical artifacts.

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara. First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Fantast Castle & Bechej town, Serbia
programme.desc: Beautiful Serbia: it is a multicultural country with a lot of fascinating places to discover. Though it is a small state, it still has one of the most significant Slavic cultural heritages in the world. Today we will travel to the pearl of Serbian lands: "&"Fantast castle and the nearby city of Becej.

programme.title: Antalya city, Turkey
programme.desc: When King Attalos first set eyes on Antalya he called it “Paradise on Earth”. Its fertile soil and natural harbour made it favourable for settlers throughout the ages. Therefore Antalya has a rich cultural heritage with many remains of an outstanding history. The Persians, Alexander the Great, the Romans, the Arabs and many more have left their mark on the area over the centuries but no one more than King Attalos of Pergamon who in 159 B.C. gave the region its name Attaleia, which leaded to the modern name Antalya....

programme.title: Mariupol town, Ukraine
programme.desc: Mariupol is a city of regional significance in south eastern Ukraine, situated on the north coast of the Sea of Azov at the mouth of the Kalmius river, in the Pryazovia region.

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Akko (6000 years of History), Israel
programme.desc: One of the most fascinating city: Akko. Discover its historical heritage and enjoy a rare blend of East and West, authentic glimpses from the past, and unique mix of religious beliefs and remnants from different cultures. Akko is one of the most vital Ancient World cities where you can find traces of a great many nations and religious movements ranging from the Canaanites, the Romans, the Byzantines, the Crusaders, the Mamluks and the Turks to the British...

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.
